use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons with attention-grabbing neon glow effects
Interactive navigation elements that reveal animated gradients on hover
Form submission buttons with subtle neon accent styling
ai_summary: A versatile button component featuring animated neon glow effects with horizontal gradient lines that appear on hover. Supports three variants (default with neon border, solid, ghost) and three sizes. The neon effect uses blue-tinted gradients with smooth 500ms transitions, creating a modern cyberpunk-inspired aesthetic suitable for dark-themed interfaces.
